race.comment: ZOUFIELD (15) is a three-year-old on the rise. Resumed over this distance at Canberra last start where he made a dash to find the lead a long way out then dug deep to prevail. Needs to go to another level but at just the second run of the prep and fourth in his career the scope is there. HANAU (3) has tackled Saturday company at all four runs this prep and performed well without winning. Missed the kick then passed half the field in the straight over 1200m at Rosehill last time. Big chance over an extra furlong today. MONTE VEEBEE (7) has been beaten twice as favourite in recent Saturdays. Will race in the leading division and back in midweek company is a serious contender. BRIGIDINE GAL (4) resumes. Beaten less than two lengths in the Group 3 Mona Lisa when fresh last prep. Classy mare who cannot be ruled out. CROSSBOW (9) was plain first-up but can do better with blinkers applied for the first time.
